turns.prompt: Use $document-update-discipline to create smoke-plan.md with a small living A-to-B plan for publishing a one-page community garden event website. The plan must start from an approved event idea and end at a publicly accessible website, remain planning-only, and contain a short dependency-ordered task list.

Use $document-update-discipline to update smoke-plan.md coherently. Add a Research Handoff section for researching free static hosting. Then use $prompt-writing to write one concise, copy-pasteable research-agent prompt in that section. Preserve the rest of the plan's meaning.
